# Simone MCP

> Production-grade MCP 2.0 code worker with streamable HTTP, stdio transport, symbol operations, OAuth 2.1 readiness, and hybrid memory integration.

## Documentation
- [README](https://github.com/Delqhi/Simone-MCP/blob/main/README.md) - Quick start, features, architecture overview
- [Architecture Docs](https://github.com/Delqhi/Simone-MCP/blob/main/docs/architecture.md) - Detailed system design with 12+ Mermaid diagrams
- [ARCHITECTURE](https://github.com/Delqhi/Simone-MCP/blob/main/ARCHITECTURE.md) - Technical design decisions and April 2026 choices
- [Contributing](https://github.com/Delqhi/Simone-MCP/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) - How to contribute
- [Security](https://github.com/Delqhi/Simone-MCP/blob/main/SECURITY.md) - Security policy and vulnerability reporting

## Key Information
- License: MIT
- Language: Python 3.12+
- Framework: FastAPI
- Protocol: MCP 2.0 + A2A JSON-RPC
- Transport: stdio + streamable HTTP
- Auth: OAuth 2.1 with JWKS
- Repo: https://github.com/Delqhi/Simone-MCP
- Primary Model: openai/gpt-5.4
- Fallback Model: opencode/minimax-m2.5-free

## Quick Links
- Issues: https://github.com/Delqhi/Simone-MCP/issues
- Discussions: https://github.com/Delqhi/Simone-MCP/discussions
- Agent Card: https://github.com/Delqhi/Simone-MCP/blob/main/.well-known/agent-card.json
- MCP Config: https://github.com/Delqhi/Simone-MCP/blob/main/mcp-config.json
